name: Local Loop - Review and Code (15 min)

parameters.command:
sh -c 'REPO="/home/cbk/qwen-agent-collective"
cd "$REPO" || { echo "REPO not found"; exit 0; }
printf "# Repo Context
generated_at: %s
" "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
printf "branch: "; git branch --show-current || true
printf "
## Git Status
"; git status --short --branch || true
printf "
## Recent Commits
"
git log --oneline -10 || true
printf "
## Diff Stat
"; git diff --stat || true
printf "
## Security Scan
"
HITS="$(git ls-files | xargs grep -nE "(API_KEY=sk-|OPENAI_API_KEY=|ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=)" 2>/dev/null || true)"
[ -z "$HITS" ] && echo "PASS: no secret patterns" || printf "%s
" "$HITS" | sed -E "s/(=)[^[:space:]]+/=REDACTED/g" | head -10'

parameters.jsCode:
const ctx = ($input.first().json.stdout || '').slice(-8000);
const now = new Date().toISOString();
const model = $env.OLLAMA_CHAT_MODEL || 'qwen3-next-cbk:latest';
const system = 'You are a local autonomous review agent for qwen-agent-collective.

Return Markdown with EXACTLY these sections:
# Local Loop Report
## Verdict
PASS, WARN, or FAIL with one sentence.
## What Changed Recently
Bullets grounded only in the context.
## Repo Health
Tests/config/docs/security observations.
## Recommended Next Work Slice
ONE micro-task under 20 shell lines: add a docstring, type hint, TODO comment, stub function, or README line. Name the exact file and function. NEVER recommend building complex features.
## Risks Or Blockers
Concrete blockers or uncertain facts.';
return [{ json: { model, now, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: system }, { role: 'user', content: 'Time: ' + now + '

Repo context:

' + (ctx || 'No context captured.') }] } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { model: $json.model, messages: $json.messages, think: false, stream: false, options: { temperature: 0.2, num_predict: 4000 } } }}

parameters.command:
sh -c 'cd /home/cbk/qwen-agent-collective || exit 0
for f in $(find . -type f -name "*.py" ! -path "./venv/*" ! -path "./.git/*" | sort | head -15); do
  printf "\n### %s ###\n" "$f"
  head -80 "$f"
done'

parameters.jsCode:
var fences = '```';
var repoCtx  = ($('Collect Repo Context').item.json.stdout || '').slice(-4000);
var report   = ($('Normalize Report').item.json.content || '').slice(-3000);
var sources  = ($input.first().json.stdout || '').slice(-4000);
var model    = $env.OLLAMA_CODE_MODEL || $env.OLLAMA_CHAT_MODEL || 'qwen3-next-cbk:latest';
var system = 'You are local-coder, an autonomous coding agent for qwen-agent-collective.

'
  + 'Implement ONE small improvement from "Recommended Next Work Slice" in the report.

'
  + 'OUTPUT: ONLY a POSIX sh script fenced in ' + fences + 'sh ... ' + fences + '.
'
  + 'Rules: POSIX sh only. Allowed: cat, printf, mkdir -p, cp, mv.
'
  + 'FORBIDDEN: rm, git push, git reset, git commit, pip install, apt-get, curl, wget.
'
  + 'Max 1-3 file changes, no deletions. Paths must stay inside /home/cbk/qwen-agent-collective.
'
  + 'If nothing safe to do, output: ' + fences + 'sh
# no-op
' + fences;
var user = '=== REVIEW REPORT ===
' + report
  + '

=== REPO CONTEXT ===
' + repoCtx
  + '

=== SOURCE FILES ===
' + sources
  + '

Output ONLY the sh script.';
return [{ json: { model, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: system }, { role: 'user', content: user }] } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { model: $json.model, messages: $json.messages, think: false, stream: false, options: { temperature: 0.1, num_predict: 4000 } } }}

parameters.command: sh -c 'cd /home/cbk/qwen-agent-collective && git add -u && git diff --staged --stat && printf "\n" && git diff --staged'

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { model: ($env.OLLAMA_CHAT_MODEL || 'qwen3-next-cbk:latest'), messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'Output ONLY a git commit message. One line, max 60 chars, Conventional Commits format (feat/fix/docs/chore/refactor: description), imperative mood. Nothing else — no explanation, no preamble, no quotes. ONLY the commit message line.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Git diff:\n' + String($json.stdout || '').slice(0, 3000) }], think: false, stream: false, options: { temperature: 0, num_predict: 1000 } } }}

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { result: 'committed', commit_message: $('Encode Commit Message').item.json.commit_message || '', git_output: $input.first().json.stdout || '' } }];
